faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Mott Haven home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in woolens, silks, or other natural fabrics, webbing in closet corners, adult moths flying near wardrobes, and larvae casings on clothing or carpets. You may also notice damaged furs, felt, or upholstered furniture. If you spot any of these signs in your Mott Haven property, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth treatment cost in Mott Haven?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Mott Haven typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the extent of treatment needed. Minor infestations in single rooms cost less, while whole-home treatments for severe cases require more comprehensive service. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does clothes moth treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most treatments show immediate results for adult moths, but complete elimination typically takes 2-4 weeks as we target all life stages including eggs and larvae. We often recommend follow-up treatments at 2-3 week intervals to ensure complete eradication. Our technicians will create a customized treatment plan based on your specific infestation level.

faqs.question: How can I prevent clothes moths from returning to my Mott Haven apartment?
faqs.answer: Prevention includes regularly cleaning and vacuuming closets, storing woolens in airtight containers, using cedar blocks or lavender sachets, and dry cleaning items before long-term storage. Keep your home well-ventilated and avoid leaving clothes undisturbed for long periods. Our technicians provide detailed prevention tips specific to your Mott Haven property during service visits.
